linkedin_templates.connection_message: Hi {first_name}, I work with {industry_type} teams on outbound pipeline and GTM strategy. Would love to connect and share what's working.
linkedin_templates.followup_message_1: Hi {first_name}, thanks for connecting. We help {industry_type} companies improve pipeline efficiency — happy to share a short case study if relevant.
linkedin_templates.followup_message_2: Hi {first_name}, following up one last time — open to a 15-min call to explore if there's a fit? No pressure either way. Happy to send a resource instead.
